title: SQL: LIKE matches too much!
poc: insert into test values ('a math assignment');
insert into test values ('pathfinder is fun!');
select * from test where v1 like '%math%';
select * from test where v1 like '% math%';
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (v1 VARCHAR, v2 VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO test (v1, v2) VALUES ('a math assignment', 'first entry');
INSERT INTO test (v1, v2) VALUES ('pathfinder is fun!', 'second entry');
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 LIKE '%math%';
SELECT * FROM test WHERE v1 LIKE '% math%';
